ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brain_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brain region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the brain region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brain region */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the brain region (cubic millimeters) */,
  "anatomical_location" TEXT /* Anatomical location of the brain region */,
  "atlas_reference" TEXT /* Reference to a standard brain atlas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment (e.g., E1, E2, E3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_regional_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brain region the data belongs to */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the data */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change from previous experiment */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the mean value */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the mean value */,
  "subject_count" INTEGER /* Number of subjects included in the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_regional_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES brain_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_regional_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the subject participated in */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imaging_modalities" (
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imaging modality */,
  "modality_name" TEXT /* Name of the imaging modality (e.g., MRI, fMRI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the imaging modality */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Spatial resolution of the imaging modality */,
  "acquisition_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for data acquisition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_imaging_data" (
  "imaging_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imaging data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the imaging data belongs to */,
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging modality used */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* File path to the imaging data */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the imaging data was acquired */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject associated with the imaging data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imaging_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_imaging_data_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_imaging_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_imaging_data_modality_id FOREIGN KEY ("modality_id") REFERENCES imaging_modalities ("modality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object detailing the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the analysis belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brain region the analysis belongs to */,
  "statistic" REAL /* Statistical value (e.g., t-score, correlation coefficient) */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the statistical test */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES brain_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the publication is based on */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
